name: hb_1_16
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Shougang Qian'an Steel Company over 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 compute and store: peak_so2 (float), peak_so2_offset_hours (whole hours from 2025-06-10 00:00 to the peak SO2 hour, int), total_so2, mean_so2 (float).

turns.query: Identify the peak SO2 emission hours of Shougang Qian'an Steel Company during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
